# bam

> Content-addressed workflow orchestration tool.
> Bridges Make/Just and Bazel: YAML task definitions → dependency graph → parallel async execution → CAS caching.
> Not production-ready — experimental/proof-of-concept.

## What bam does

- Defines tasks in a `bam.yaml` file (name, command, inputs, outputs, dependencies, env vars)
- Builds a dependency graph and runs tasks in topological order, in parallel where possible
- Computes a content hash from input files + command; skips execution (cache hit) when nothing changed
- Stores/restores outputs as compressed archives in a local `.bam/cache/` dir or a remote CAS server

## Installation

```bash
uv pip install bam   # recommended
pip install bam
```

## bam.yaml — Full Schema

```yaml
version: 1                   # required; only valid value is 1

cache:                        # optional block
  type: local                 # "local" (default) or "cas"
  url: grpc://host:50051      # CAS server URL; required when type=cas
  local_fallback: true        # fall back to local cache on CAS failure

tasks:
  <task-name>:                # unique identifier; used in depends_on and CLI
    command: "..."            # required; shell command (supports pipes, redirects, multiline |)
    inputs:                   # optional; glob patterns used to compute cache key
      - "src/**/*.py"
      - "pyproject.toml"
    outputs:                  # optional; files/dirs produced; required for caching
      - "dist/"
      - "build/app.js"
    depends_on:               # optional; tasks that must complete before this one
      - other-task
    env:                      # optional; extra environment variables for this task
      NODE_ENV: production
      DEBUG: "0"
```

### Key rules
- A task is **only cached** when it declares `outputs`.
- A cache hit requires all `inputs` to be unchanged **and** the `command` string to be identical.
- `depends_on` tasks run first; independent tasks run in parallel automatically.
- Cycles in `depends_on` are detected at startup and reported as an error.
- `command` is executed via the system shell (`shell=True`); supports `$VAR`, `${VAR}` expansion.

## CLI Reference

```
bam run [OPTIONS] TASK [TASK...]    # Run tasks (+ dependencies)
bam list [OPTIONS]                  # List all tasks
bam graph [OPTIONS]                 # Visualize dependency graph
bam validate [OPTIONS]              # Check config for errors
bam clean [OPTIONS]                 # Clear local cache
```

### bam run options
| Flag | Default | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `--config PATH` | auto-discover | Path to `bam.yaml` |
| `--dry-run` | off | Show plan without executing |
| `--quiet / -q` | off | Suppress command output |
| `--no-cache` | off | Disable cache reads and writes |
| `--jobs N` | CPU count | Max parallel workers |
| `--plain` | off | Plain output (no rich/tree UI) |

### bam graph options
| Flag | Default | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `--format ascii\|dot` | `ascii` | Output format (`dot` for GraphViz) |

### bam clean options
| Flag | Default | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `--cache-dir PATH` | `.bam/cache` | Cache directory to remove |
| `--force / -f` | off | Skip confirmation prompt |

## Config File Discovery (in order)

1. `--config` CLI flag
2. `BAM_CONFIG` environment variable
3. `./bam.yaml` in current directory
4. `./.bam.yaml` in current directory
5. Walk parent directories until found

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Default | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| `BAM_CONFIG` | `./bam.yaml` | Override config path |
| `BAM_CACHE_DIR` | `./.bam/cache` | Local cache directory |
| `BAM_CACHE_TYPE` | `local` | `local` or `cas` |
| `BAM_CAS_URL` | `grpc://localhost:50051` | Remote CAS server |
| `BAM_LOG_LEVEL` | `INFO` | `DEBUG` / `INFO` / `WARNING` |
| `BAM_MAX_PARALLEL` | CPU count | Max concurrent tasks |

## Common Patterns

### Linear pipeline
```yaml
version: 1
tasks:
  install:
    command: npm ci
    inputs: [package-lock.json]
    outputs: [node_modules/]

  build:
    command: npm run build
    inputs: [src/**/*.ts]
    outputs: [dist/]
    depends_on: [install]

  test:
    command: npm test
    inputs: [src/**/*.ts, tests/**/*.ts]
    depends_on: [build]
```

### Fan-out / fan-in (parallel lint + test, then deploy)
```yaml
version: 1
tasks:
  setup:
    command: pip install -e .
    inputs: [pyproject.toml]
    outputs: [.venv/]

  lint:
    command: ruff check .
    inputs: [src/**/*.py]
    depends_on: [setup]

  test:
    command: pytest
    inputs: [src/**/*.py, tests/**/*.py]
    depends_on: [setup]

  deploy:
    command: ./scripts/deploy.sh
    depends_on: [lint, test]   # both must pass; ran in parallel before this
```

### Remote (distributed) cache
```yaml
version: 1
cache:
  type: cas
  url: grpc://cache.internal:50051
  local_fallback: true

tasks:
  build:
    command: make build
    inputs: [src/**]
    outputs: [build/]
```

### Per-task environment variables
```yaml
version: 1
tasks:
  build-prod:
    command: npm run build
    env:
      NODE_ENV: production
      API_URL: https://api.example.com
    inputs: [src/**]
    outputs: [dist/]
```

### Multiline command
```yaml
tasks:
  ci:
    command: |
      set -e
      echo "Running CI..."
      ruff check .
      pyright
      pytest --tb=short
```

## Exit Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 0 | All tasks succeeded |
| 1 | Task failure, config error, or validation error |
| 130 | Interrupted (Ctrl-C) |

## Tips

- `bam run --dry-run build` — preview execution order without running anything
- `bam run --no-cache build` — force rebuild, ignoring cached outputs
- `bam graph --format dot | dot -Tsvg > graph.svg` — render dependency graph as SVG
- `bam validate` — always run before deploying config changes to CI
- Cache misses are silently skipped; the task re-runs and its outputs are stored on completion

## Full Example (Python project)

```yaml
version: 1

cache:
  type: local

tasks:
  install:
    command: uv sync
    inputs:
      - pyproject.toml
      - uv.lock
    outputs:
      - .venv/

  lint:
    command: ruff check src/
    inputs:
      - src/**/*.py
      - pyproject.toml
    depends_on:
      - install

  typecheck:
    command: pyright
    inputs:
      - src/**/*.py
      - pyproject.toml
    depends_on:
      - install

  test:
    command: pytest --tb=short -q
    inputs:
      - src/**/*.py
      - tests/**/*.py
      - pyproject.toml
    depends_on:
      - lint
      - typecheck

  build:
    command: uv build
    inputs:
      - src/**/*.py
      - pyproject.toml
    outputs:
      - dist/
    depends_on:
      - test
```

Run with: `bam run build`

---
Source: https://gitlab.com/cascascade/bam  
Docs: `docs/configuration.md` · `docs/cli.md`
